---
pagetitle: "İstatistiksel Yöntem Seçimi"
description-meta: "Tıbbi araştırmalarda istatistiksel yöntem seçimi — interaktif rehber"
---

```{=html}
<header class="site-header">
  <h1 class="site-title" data-i18n="site.title">İstatistiksel Yöntem Seçimi</h1>
  <nav class="site-nav">
    <button id="lang-toggle" class="lang-toggle" aria-label="Dil değiştir">EN</button>
    <a class="github-link" href="https://github.com/drmuammer/istatistik-yontem-secimi" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="GitHub">GitHub</a>
  </nav>
</header>

<div class="page-content">
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-bg" id="hero-bg" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    <div class="hero-content">
      <h2 data-i18n="hero.title"></h2>
      <p data-i18n="hero.lead"></p>
      <button class="cta" data-action="start" data-i18n="hero.cta"></button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="explorer" id="explorer">
    <div class="wizard-pane" id="wizard"></div>
    <button id="show-map" class="show-map" type="button" aria-controls="tree" data-i18n="tree.show_map"></button>
    <div class="tree-pane" id="tree"></div>
  </section>
  <button id="close-map" class="close-map" type="button" aria-label="Kapat">✕</button>

  <section class="result" id="result" hidden></section>
</div>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p data-i18n="footer.attribution"></p>
  <p data-i18n="footer.disclaimer"></p>
  <p data-i18n="footer.license"></p>
  <ul class="sources" id="footer-sources"></ul>
</footer>
```
